summary: Iteration 45 testing completed for Notification Sound + Browser Notification feature. All core features working: bell toggle visible for admin/manager (not server), toggle persists to localStorage, ding sound plays via Web Audio API on delta detection, browser Notification fires (when permission granted). Fixed a bug where ding would play even when notifications disabled (stale closure issue).
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed bug: notifEnabled state was captured in stale closure by setInterval. Added notifEnabledRef to ensure toggle state is always current when fetchNotifCounts runs.
seed_data_creation: Test needs created and cleaned up during delta detection tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 45 tested new Notification Sound + Browser Notification feature. Key test IDs: notif-toggle-btn (bell toggle button in header). Bell toggle only visible for admin and manager roles, NOT for server. Toggle switches between Bell (enabled, amber color) and BellOff (disabled, slate color) icons. State persists to localStorage key 'caisse_notif_enabled'. When enabled, delta detection on /api/notifications/counts polling triggers playDing() (Web Audio API) and sendBrowserNotification(). notifInitRef prevents spurious alerts on initial load. Fixed stale closure bug by using notifEnabledRef instead of notifEnabled state in fetchNotifCounts.

tests: Admin login: bell toggle button visible (data-testid='notif-toggle-btn')
Manager login: bell toggle button visible
Server login: bell toggle button NOT visible (correct behavior)
Click toggle: switches from enabled (amber/Bell) to disabled (slate/BellOff)
Click again: returns to original state
Toggle state persists to localStorage key 'caisse_notif_enabled'
When enabled: creating new need triggers ding sound (AudioContext created)
Ding plays within 10-15s polling cycle
notifInitRef guard prevents ding on initial load
When disabled: creating new need does NOT trigger ding sound
Visual badges still update (only audio/notification suppressed)
Notification.requestPermission() called ~1.5s after login for admin/manager
sendBrowserNotification() called on delta detection (verified in code)
Note: Browser notification not visible in headless test (permission not granted)
GET /api/notifications/counts?role=admin returns 200 with all 9 count keys
GET /api/notifications/counts?role=manager returns 200 with 4 count keys
GET /api/notifications/counts?role=server returns 200 with 1 count key (notes)
playDing() creates AudioContext without errors
Oscillator configured for A5->E6 frequency sweep (880Hz->1320Hz)
Gain envelope creates discrete 'ding' sound (~0.4s duration)
No JS console errors when Notification API unavailable
No JS console errors when AudioContext unavailable
Silent catch blocks prevent UI blocking

bug_fixed.description: Ding sound played even when notifications were disabled
bug_fixed.root_cause: fetchNotifCounts function captured stale notifEnabled state in closure when setInterval was created. Toggling notifEnabled didn't update the closure.
bug_fixed.fix: Added notifEnabledRef (useRef) that is updated in toggleNotifEnabled. Changed fetchNotifCounts to check notifEnabledRef.current instead of notifEnabled state.
lines_changed: Line 1007: Added notifEnabledRef.current = next in toggleNotifEnabled
Line 964: Changed condition to use notifEnabledRef.current
